title: dalea gigantea
intro: Dalea gigantea, also known as the giant or prairie clover, is a perennial legume plant native to North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dalea gigantea include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
